creator: schrodinger@konundrum.org
text:
Created attachment 212768
poudriere build log

sysutils/osquery fails to build for me on FreeBSD 12.1 amd64 12.1-RELEASE-p3 r359210

Attached is the build log from poudriere. Built with "poudriere bulk -j 12_1-amd64 -p local -z workstation sysutils/osquery"

/etc/make.conf looks like this:

OPTIONS_UNSET=CUPS
QT4_OPTIONS=-CUPS
